title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: What hobbies or interests have you had since you were young?
Have you ever taken up a new hobby as an adult? What was it?
What hobby would you most like to try in the future? Why?
Do you think it's important to have hobbies outside of work or study?
Has a hobby ever led to a new opportunity or skill for you?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think hobbies are more important than work for a person's happiness?
Is it important to be good at something you do for fun?
Do you think having a hobby can improve a person's professional life?
